title: The Aether Sawmill Compat (Woodworks/Aether Addon)
description: An Aether/Woodworks addon Data Pack/Mod that adds the ability to saw Skyroot Planks and logs from The Aether in the Sawmill from the Woodworks mod.
body:
This is a Data Pack/Mod that adds the ability to saw Skyroot logs and planks from [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) in the Sawmill from Team Abnormals's [Woodworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/woodworks) mod.


```
Note to the authors/devs/owners of Woodworks or The Aether:
If you wish to integrate this datapack's recipes to your mod, feel free to do so!
```
